content:
You can add the email address to your Android contacts app. TBA uses this rather than a dedicated address book for email address lookup.

  1. Grant TBA permission to read from your contacts app.
  2. Enable desired settings under TBA settings > general settings > display
  • Show correspondent names
  • Show contact names
  • Show contact pictures

To pick a contact's email address.

  1. Open the email compose screen.
  2. Press the 3dot menu.
  3. Press 'Add from contacts' . (Only visible when permission is granted)

The idea for an address book has been suggested by the community on Mozilla connect. You can vote for the request at the link below. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/an-address-book-in-thunderbird-for-android/idi-p/84952
creator: platform34

content:
Can you provide a screen shot of the email compose screen so your issue can be better understood.

A good first step is to confirm the SMTP settings are working.

  1. Navigate to settings > account > sending mail > outgoing server.
  2. Click next on the page to test the server connection.
